positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for picuris_positive
% SZS output start Proof for picuris_positive
1. is_mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) | is_mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,texas) [input(axiom)]

5. ? [X0] : (visited(juan_de_onate,X0) & is_mountain_range_in(X0,new_mexico)) [input(conjecture)]
6. ~? [X0] : (visited(juan_de_onate,X0) & is_mountain_range_in(X0,new_mexico)) [negated conjecture 5]
7. ~is_mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,texas) | ~located_in(harding_pegmatite_mine,picuris_mountains) | ~donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) [ennf transformation 4]
8. ! [X0] : (~visited(juan_de_onate,X0) | ~is_mountain_range_in(X0,new_mexico)) [ennf transformation 6]
9. is_mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) | is_mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,texas) [cnf transformation 1]
10. visited(juan_de_onate,picuris_mountains) [cnf transformation 2]
11. donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) [cnf transformation 3]
12. located_in(harding_pegmatite_mine,picuris_mountains) [cnf transformation 3]
13. ~is_mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,texas) | ~located_in(harding_pegmatite_mine,picuris_mountains) | ~donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) [cnf transformation 7]
14. ~visited(juan_de_onate,X0) | ~is_mountain_range_in(X0,new_mexico) [cnf transformation 8]
16. 1 <=> donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) [avatar definition]
20. 2 <=> located_in(harding_pegmatite_mine,picuris_mountains) [avatar definition]
24. 3 <=> is_mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,texas) [avatar definition]
27. ~1 | ~2 | ~3 [avatar split clause 13,24,20,16]
28. 1 [avatar split clause 11,16]
29. 2 [avatar split clause 12,20]
31. 4 <=> is_mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) [avatar definition]
33. is_mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) <- (4) [avatar component clause 31]
34. 3 | 4 [avatar split clause 9,31,24]
35. ~is_mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) [resolution 10,14]
36. $false <- (4) [forward subsumption resolution 35,33]
37. ~4 [avatar contradiction clause 36]
s1. ~3 | ~2 | ~1 [sat_conversion 27]
s2. 1 [sat_conversion 28]
s3. 2 [sat_conversion 29]
s4. 3 | 4 [sat_conversion 34]
s5. ~4 [sat_conversion 37]
s6. 3 [rat s4,s5]
s7. # [rat s1,s2,s3,s6]
38. $false [avatar sat refutation s7]

% Termination reason: Refutation
